title: Jesuh in Tang Dingin Hong Sawl

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Jesuh in eite khuaimei vak bangin,
Zan khuamialna sungah tangin hong sawl hi;
Nang na omna kiim ah, kei, kei’ kiim

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: I meivak a mial ciang Amah’n hong
I meivak tang van pan Amah’n ensuk,
Nang na omna kiim ah, kei, kei’ kiim

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Mawhna, dahna, natna sung i tang ding,
Nang na omna kiim ah, kei, kei’ kiim ah.
